response.justification: James brings 15+ years of full-stack breadth, current Staff-level experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling (directly matching the AI-native environment), and genuine high-throughput systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second. However, Python — a must-have — is absent from his skill set and history, his highest-scale distributed systems work was in DLang and dates to 2020, and evidence of directing technical strategy or cross-functional stakeholder management at scale is thin.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator work at Staff level
Real high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP req/sec)
Strong TypeScript/Node.js plus deep craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No Python experience listed despite it being a must-have skill
Most intense distributed-systems work was in DLang and ended in 2020
Limited demonstrated experience driving technical strategy and cross-functional stakeholder coordination
